knockoutMilestone.description: +1 bonus each time a team advances to a new knockout round (max +5 through the final).

rulesText.summary: Each lab member owns 3 teams. Points come from match results (3/1/0) plus +1 each time a team advances to a new knockout round.
rulesText.matchPoints: Win = 3 pts, Draw = 1 pt, Loss = 0 pts. Applies to all matches including knockouts.
rulesText.penalties: If a knockout match is decided on penalties, it counts as a draw (1 pt each) for match scoring. The team that advances earns the +1 bonus for reaching the next knockout round.
rulesText.milestone: Each knockout round reached earns +1 bonus (they stack: R32 = 1, R16 = 2, quarter-final = 3, semi-final = 4, final = 5). Bonuses follow the tournament bracket tree: a team earns +1 when they advance to each knockout round. Round of 32 bonuses are awarded only after all 72 group matches have finished and openfootball lists confirmed teams (not placeholders) in every Round of 32 fixture. Later rounds are decided from knockout match results in the bracket. Winning the final does not add a separate bonus beyond reaching the final.
rulesText.playerTotal: Your score is the sum of all points from your three teams.
